name: SafeBase Trust Center API
what_it_does: Interactive trust center and security questionnaire automation platform with REST API — enabling companies to publish a public trust center with security posture, automatically answer vendor security questionnaires using AI, manage NDA-gated documentation access, and track which customers have reviewed security content.
use_cases: Querying security questionnaire response analytics for sales cycle tracking
Managing trust center document access and NDA gate status via API
Syncing trust center content updates with internal security documentation systems
Automating questionnaire completion workflow triggers when new deals open in CRM
Pulling customer security review engagement data for account health monitoring
not_for: Vendor risk management and third-party security assessments (use BitSight or SecurityScorecard)
Compliance automation and continuous control monitoring (use Vanta or Drata)
Penetration testing and security scanning services
best_when: A B2B SaaS company wants to reduce friction in enterprise sales security reviews by publishing a public trust center and automating vendor questionnaire responses.
avoid_when: You need third-party risk management (assessing your vendors), compliance automation (SOC2 evidence collection), or penetration testing.

auth.notes: API key from SafeBase account settings. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped access. Webhook for trust center access requests and questionnaire events. No OAuth2. Salesforce integration available via separate OAuth flow.

pricing.paid_tiers: Startup from $200/month; Growth custom; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: San Francisco-based company. Founded 2019. Raised $18M. AI questionnaire auto-fill feature. CRM integrations (Salesforce, HubSpot). Automated NDA generation and signature via DocuSign. Trust center public or gated. Used by Lattice, Grammarly, Amplitude. YC and other VC-backed.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for trust center management, questionnaire tracking, and access control. Bearer token auth. Good documentation for core use cases. Webhook for access request events. AI questionnaire completion primarily UI-driven. Salesforce integration for deal-stage sync.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Document reads idempotent. Access grant reads idempotent. Questionnaire reads idempotent by ID. NDA status reads idempotent by counterparty.
known_agent_gotchas: AI questionnaire auto-fill is primarily a UI feature — API provides tracking, not AI completion
Trust center documents must be uploaded via UI before API management
NDA gate requires DocuSign integration setup before API management works
CRM integration uses separate OAuth flow from API key auth
Access request approvals may require human review — implement async workflow

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US data residency. Bearer token auth. Security questionnaire data is sensitive — contains security posture details. NDA-gated content requires secure access control. Trust center is a security product — must itself be secure.
